name: Nadanamakriya

sources.label: Suja Music — Nadanamakriya scale and notes

notes: Janya of Mayamalavagowla (15th melakarta); nishandantya raga (highest note is Nishada); ārohana S R1 G3 M1 P D1 N3, avarohana N3 D1 P M1 G3 R1 S N3; evokes a questioning, yearning, contemplative mood; associated with slow-tempo padams and meditative compositions
